title: icy yeasty russian melon bao
description: a unique russian dish featuring melons, crumbly yeasty bao, and ssam-wrap, perfect for a diabetic-friendly dessert.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix yeast and sugar with 1/4 cup warm milk to activate yeast.
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, eggs, melted butter, and salt.
Add the yeast mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Place a spoonful of diced melon on one half of each disk, then fold the other half over to form a bun.
Bake the buns for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm with additional melon and ssam-wrap pieces on the side.
